name: @4-r-c-4-n-4/todo
description: Git-native work tracking for coding agents

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --outfile=dist/bundle.js --external:crypto --external:fs --external:path --external:child_process --external:os --external:readline && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/bundle.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')){fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)}"
